Typography Sample

Headings and inline styles

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

Normal text with bold, strong, italic, and emphasis in one paragraph to exercise inline runs.

Level three

Level four

Level five
Level six

A longer paragraph so the layout engine has to wrap a real line of text across the content width. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs, and then measure how the greedy line breaker distributes the words.
